name: pos-shop-store
description: Enterprise Retail & Wholesale POS — React + Express + Prisma + PostgreSQL

scripts.db:up: npm run preflight && docker compose up -d && node scripts/wait-db.mjs
scripts.setup: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix web install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix web run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix server run build && npm --prefix web run build
